html.p: Description: This model was built with CarveMe version 1.5.1

species.name: Two disacharide linked murein units, tripeptide crosslinked tetrapeptide (A2pm->D-ala) (middle of chain)
Two linked disacharide tetrapeptide and tripeptide murein units (uncrosslinked, middle of chain)
Two linked disacharide pentapeptide murein units (uncrosslinked, middle of chain)
Two disacharide linked murein units, pentapeptide crosslinked tetrapeptide (A2pm->D-ala) (middle of chain)

reaction.name: 3 Phospho D glycerate transport inout via proton symport
Trans-4-Hydroxy-L-proline transport (transport mechanism unknown - evidence from biolog data)
LalaDgluMdapDala (pentapeptide) transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
Acetate reversible transport via proton symport
Adenosine transport in via proton symport
D-alanyl-D-alanine (DalaDala) transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
GlcNAc-anhMurNAc transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
L-asparagine transport in via sodium symport
L-Cysteinylglycine transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
Chorismate transport inout via proton symport
CO2 transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
Cobalt (Co+2) transport via diffusion (extracellular to cytoplasm)
Cyanate transport via proton symport periplasm
Cyanide transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
D-alanine transport in via proton symport (periplasm)
DTMP transport inout via proton symport
Ferripyoverdine complex formation P putida KT2440 specific
Formate transport in via proton symport
Glutarate reversible transport via symport periplasm
Glutarate transport via diffusion extracellular to periplasm
D glutamate transport in via proton symport
L-glutamate transport via proton symport, reversible (periplasm)
Glutathione export via ABC system (cytoplasm to periplasm)
Guanine reversible transport via proton symport
H2O transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
L-histidine transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
L isoleucine reversible transport via proton symport
L leucine reversible transport via proton symport
MAN6P transport inout via proton symport
Magnesium transport in/out via permease (no H+)
Manganese transport in via proton symport
Ammonia transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
Oxygen transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
Propanoyl phosphate transport (transport mechanism unknown - evidence from biolog data)
Quinate transport (transport mechanism unknown - evidence from biolog data)
Riboflavin transport in via proton symport
L serine reversible transport via proton symport
Thiocyanate transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
Thiocyanate transport via diffusion periplasm to periplasm
L threonine reversible transport via proton symport
Thymine reversible transport via facilated diffusion
Thymine transport out via proton antiport (periplasm)
Thymine transport via diffusion (extracellular to periplasm)
Trehalose transport in via proton symporter
L tryptophan reversible transport via proton symport
UMP transport in via proton symport
Uracil transport in via proton symport
L valine reversible transport via proton symport
